flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hebrew Theological College are 43% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($33.3k vs $58.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hebrew Theological College rose 65% between 2019 and 2020 ($8.5k → $14.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hebrew Theological College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.8k → $15.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hebrew Theological College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.8k → $15.2k).
